data.body: STATUS (handoff): OPEN, NOT started. DEPENDS ON the two impact-redesign children (#1 fishable-apivorous-redhead [committed 29d9fa863], #6 albite-lazy-barb [pending]) and the data-capture child (#8). Scope: permissive thresholds/flags for the new impact models (no new hard blocks at rollout); an impact_model_version sidecar tag (plan-v2/code-v2) so the calibration replay SEGMENTS old vs new formula findings (refuses to pool across versions); extend docs/experiments/calibrate_plan_review_thresholds.py to filter by impact_model_version; a diff-grounded A/B script gating any threshold-down change on beating the current model; a documented recalibration cadence. Because it references stack symbols (impact_plan/impact_code/sidecar fields), its plan-review + claim MUST be stack-grounded via REBAR_GATE_REF=<stack tip>. Implement LAST.
